name: A meeting center
description:
This is a meeting-place, set aside by the leaders of Bree for the many
adventurers, explorers and others who pass through this crossroads town seeking
long-lost friends or new acquaintances.  It is said that if you spend an hour
or two here, you can not h or a new enemy.  There truly is nothing remarkable
about this spot, but it has become the tradition for people to meet here.  
There is a large sign planted in the ground here.
